help_step2: Copy and paste the code above.
choose_version: Which version do you want to use?
token_invalid: Invalid token. Please check and try again.
schema_error_body: Local save data is incompatible. Please update the extension.
guide_step1_desc: Go to Settings and enter your Personal Access Token. This allows the app to securely store data in your personal GitHub Gist.
guide_step2_desc: Use the 'Sync' button to upload or download the latest data. The system automatically detects the newer backup to update.
guide_step3_desc: Enable Auto Collect and let the system help you pick up suns and coins in the game completely automatically.
guide_quick_action_desc: Access the game homepage directly to play and sync.
guide_token_title: How to Create a GitHub Personal Access Token
guide_token_desc: To enable cloud sync, the extension securely utilizes GitHub Gist. You need to generate a token with Gist access.
guide_token_step1_desc: Log in to GitHub and click the button below to go to the Token page. Name it (e.g. 'PVZGE Sync') and choose Expiration. We recommend 'No expiration' to prevent future sync issues.
guide_token_step1_img_info: Name your Token and set its expiration
guide_token_step2_desc: Scroll down and check the gist scope checkbox. This permission allows the extension to securely store and sync your backup files in your personal GitHub Gists.
guide_token_step3_desc: Scroll all the way to the bottom and click the green 'Generate token' button to create your token.
guide_token_step3_img_info: Click the 'Generate token' button at the bottom
guide_token_step4_desc: Copy the newly created token string (starts with ghp_). Then open the Extension Settings, paste it into the GitHub Token input field, and click Save.
guide_token_step4_img_info: Copy the token and paste it in Extension Settings
guide_token_note_desc: NEVER share your token with anyone else. The extension only stores it locally in your browser and communicates directly with GitHub.
guide_features_desc: Learn in detail about the amazing built-in features that optimize and protect your PvZGE gameplay progress.
guide_feature1_desc: This feature automatically backs up your save data to the cloud (GitHub Gist) at your preferred interval (e.g. every 5, 10, 30 minutes...) without needing any manual button clicks.
guide_feature1_how_to_desc: Go to Settings tab, enable 'Auto Sync' and input your desired sync interval in minutes.
guide_feature1_smart_desc: The system only uploads when there are actual changes in the new data, saving bandwidth and optimizing resources.
guide_feature2_desc: Free your hands! While in-game, the extension will automatically scan and collect Suns, Gold/Silver Coins, and items appearing on the screen with ultra-fast speed.
guide_feature2_how_to_desc: Enable 'Auto Collect' directly on the extension's main interface.
guide_feature2_secure_desc: Simulates smooth natural clicks directly in the game loop of play.pvzge.com for an extremely safe and fluid gameplay experience.
guide_feature3_desc: Maximum peace of mind with offline files. You can download your save data directly to your computer as a .json file or upload an existing backup from any device without needing internet cloud access.
guide_feature3_export_desc: Click 'Export JSON' on the main page to download a physical save file (.json) to your local drive.
guide_feature3_import_desc: Click 'Import JSON' and select the saved .json backup file to instantly restore your gameplay progress.
guide_faq_desc: Answers to common questions and tips to keep your game saves secure and smooth.
guide_faq1_q: How do I know my data has synced successfully?
guide_faq1_a: Upon clicking Sync or during auto-sync, you will see a timestamp message "Last sync: DD/MM/YYYY hh:mm:ss" displayed on the main home screen.
guide_faq2_a: The extension automatically simulates clicks to collect Suns and Gold Coins that appear on the screen, saving you from tedious manual clicking.
guide_faq3_q: Can I continue my progress on a different browser or PC?
guide_faq3_a: Absolutely! Just install this extension in your new browser, configure it with the same GitHub Token, and click "Sync". The system will download your latest cloud save file instantly.
guide_faq4_a: While cloud sync is secure, we recommend clicking "Export JSON" once in a while to store a hard backup directly on your local drive for peace of mind.
